creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text: OK, I know this was committed, but I have to question something in the patch to update it to 1.8.7. Why is there a forced dependency on print/tex-dvipsk and print/cm-super? The port doesn't need tex to build UNLESS the PDFDOCS option is enabled. And I have no idea why print/cm-super was added. Can this be looked in to? Especially the tex part, because someone apparently complained to me about the forced dependency on tex.
